title: Urban Living Lav Tasty Airtight Jar with Screw Lid 1Ltr
features: 0.5L or 1L - these jars are perfect to store anything from chutneys, jams to spices to homemade delights, chevros or snacks. Endless uses. Perfect in glass in 2 different sizes Glass storage jars with copper/rose-gold metal screw top lids to keep your kitchen storage organised and you up-to-date when your food/ingredients are running low. Be creative and keep your favourite range of foods such as sweets, rice, flour, lentils, pasta and many other foods well preserved with these metal screw top

3 in 1 Kitchen Storage Jars –0.5L Size – 8cm x 8cm x 12cm.1L Size - 9cm x 9cm x 17cmWith this 1 glass kitchen storage jar you will get 3 all rounder benefits. This clear glass jar will make your life easy as you will know when to stock up on food and it will give your kitchen better organisation while preserving food stored inside to ensure it does not get spoiled or contaminated in any way. You will be able to keep food clean, fresh, tasty and nutritious for a long time.

Safe Food Storage – Being made out of glass, with this jar you shall be assured that all food stored and taken out will be safe to eat at any time. Glass is a non-porous and inert material therefore, it will not react with any food stored, no matter if its hot or cold.

Everlasting Storage Design – Glass storage accessories are always designed to last you a long time. This glass jar is made from thick, strong and heavy glass to make it most durable and everlasting. You will repeatedly be able to wash and use this glass jar without having to face any defects or problems.

Latest Kitchen Decor – No matter what your kitchen décor is, this copper/rose-gold glass jar will give your kitchen the latest trend and design. A simple glass and “cook, taste, eat” quote will make you exactly do that. It will give that stylish yet simple look to the inside of your kitchen cupboards.
description: Urban Living, A recognized brand in the United States, is proud to offer its kitchen storage containers on Amazon France. These containers are designed to bring a touch of elegance and efficiency to your culinary space. They are a reflection of exceptional quality, unparalleled style and flawless reliability. Each box is made with the utmost care and attention to detail, ensuring exceptional durability and strength. The sleek and modern design of the Urban Living canisters fits perfectly with any kitchen style, adding a touch of elegance to your space.
